coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:30 of engine-building.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 5:00. This should hurt just enough.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/18. 5:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.
